comment: Travis Picker UI themes. Roles: bg = app background (carries theme identity); surface = empty grid cells / panels; accent = beat-column highlights, buttons, headers (also finger notes + text); active = filled note circles (thumb); label = text inside note circles (p/i/m/a or fret numbers); hardware (OPTIONAL) = metal fittings (sheet lip, die border, jewel rim), defaults to house brass #c9a24a; playhead (OPTIONAL) = sounding-column color, defaults to mix(surface, active, 0.4) - override when that blend desaturates. Swap via data-theme attribute + CSS custom properties.

themes.name: Chet
themes.desc: Gretsch cherry & gold — big, red, unapologetic
themes.label: #5a0d16

themes.name: Jerry
themes.desc: Swamp — dark water, muddy bank, bronze glint
themes.label: #12241a

themes.name: Doc
themes.desc: Blue Ridge — denim sky, honey sunrise, nickel frets
themes.label: #12253d

themes.name: Elizabeth
themes.desc: Honey light-mode — warm paper, marigold, copper kettle
themes.label: #3d2c18
